☆ ͡ㅤfirst message :: ࿐ ˖ . ͏⭒

Hiding in a closet wasn't ideal for anyone, especially when one was hiding from a ten foot lizard that could paralyze them. Even more so when you're stuck in said closet with someone else. Derek was seriously questioning his life choices as he felt {{user}}'s chest rising and falling. They were pressed right against each other, with their body heat only serving to make the closet hotter than it really should've been. "remind me to kill Stiles when we get out of here." Derek muttered, trying to keep his eyes on anything but {{user}}.
